settings.heading: Empowering The Inner Alpha
settings.lede: The Absolute Alpha Standard in Activewear - performance, innovation and sustainability woven into every piece.

settings.label: Our Vision
settings.copy: To create activewear that redefines the athlete's experience, pushing the boundaries of innovation and inspiring a global community.

settings.label: Our Mission
settings.copy: To deliver exceptional products and services that exceed customer expectations while fostering a culture of innovation and integrity. To revolutionize the activewear industry by building a global community of 1 million athletes who experience the transformative power of interactive activewear, fueled by cutting-edge technology and sustainable practices.

settings.heading: Our Ikigai
settings.copy_primary: ZODA is inspired by the Ikigai of empowering the inner Alpha. We champion the relentless pursuit of personal excellence, the unwavering determination to overcome challenges and the indomitable spirit that fuels true champions. ZODA is not just a brand. It is a mindset.
settings.copy_secondary: Hence we are building The Absolute Alpha Standard in Activewear. Performance sports clothing that comes to life with deep innovation in fabric, game changing technology in the construction and precision in design that defines our true purpose - to equip athletes with the tools and inspiration to ascend beyond their perceived limits, forging a path of continuous growth and self-discovery.

settings.title: Technology
settings.copy: ZODA is driven by an unwavering commitment to innovation, continuously pushing the boundaries of activewear technology to empower athletes and elevate their performance.

settings.title: Sustainability
settings.copy: We meticulously select organic cotton, recycled polyester and innovative fibres made from recycled plastic bottles.

settings.title: Community
settings.copy: Forge unbreakable bonds with a diverse network of athletes who share the same drive and determination.

settings.heading: Our Pillars of Excellence
settings.lede: Built for those who rise, conquer, and push limits, we create high-performance, sustainable activewear that fuels a global movement of champions.

settings.title: High-Quality Fabrics
settings.copy: We utilize only the finest fabrics, meticulously chosen for their exceptional performance, durability and sustainable sourcing.

settings.title: Body Mapping Technology
settings.copy: Designed for precision, our garments use advanced body mapping to enhance comfort, movement, and performance.

settings.title: Ergonomic Patterns
settings.copy: Engineered for a natural fit, our patterns follow the body's contours to ensure seamless functionality.

settings.title: Strategic Seam Placement
settings.copy: Optimized seams reduce friction and enhance flexibility, keeping you focused on every move.

settings.title: Reinforced Construction
settings.copy: Built to endure, our garments feature reinforced stitching for unmatched durability and lasting performance.

settings.hero_alt: Three runners on a wooden pathway with a city skyline in the background
settings.secondary_alt: Close-up of a teal performance wear pocket
settings.tertiary_alt: Close-up of ZODA logo buttons on technical fabric
settings.heading: Engineered to outperform.
settings.copy: We lead in activewear innovation, crafting high-performance garments with cutting-edge fabrics like regenerated nylons and recycled cotton, certified by GRS and BCI. Engineered for breathability, moisture-wicking, and durability, our materials ensure peak performance.

settings.heading: AuraForm
settings.copy: Experience the pinnacle of performance and comfort with ZODA's AuraForm. This technically advanced blend is meticulously engineered using Zenith Tech exclusively for sports bras. We focused on providing the right support in the construction of the fabric along with exceptional durability, empowering you to push your limits with confidence.

settings.heading: Made with the planet in mind.
settings.copy: ZODA is dedicated to protecting our planet through responsible practices at every stage of production. We source eco-friendly materials, including OCS and GOTS-certified organic cotton and GRS-certified recycled polyester. Our partners meet high social and environmental standards, ensuring safe, fair working conditions and reduced impacts. Committed to continuous improvement, ZODA actively works towards waste reduction, water conservation, and a circular economy for sustainable future.

settings.heading: Together we achieve more.
settings.lede: ZODA is more than a brand; it's a community of champions united by a passion for pushing limits. Whether you're a pro or just starting out, ZODA welcomes you - because together, we achieve more.
